commands.name: class

options.name: --git
options.description: Git-style unified diff (stdout if no file specified)

options.name: --html
options.description: HTML report to file (required: file path)

options.name: --interface
options.description: Interface name for interface matching strategy

options.name: --json
options.description: JSON output (stdout if no file specified)

options.name: --match-by
options.description:
Matching strategy: exact, interface, similarity, or
auto

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Disable colored output

options.name: --open
options.description: Open HTML in default browser after generation

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress default console output

options.name: --similarity
options.description:
Similarity threshold for similarity matching
(0.0-1.0)

options.name: --text
options.description: Plain text diff (stdout if no file specified)

commands.description: Compare specific classes between two files

commands.name: diff

options.name: --context
options.description: Lines of context to show [[default: 3]]

options.name: --git
options.description: Git-style unified diff (stdout if no file specified)

options.name: --html
options.description: HTML report to file (required: file path)

options.name: --ignore-whitespace
options.description: Ignore whitespace differences

options.name: --impact-level
options.description:
Minimum impact level: breaking-public,
breaking-internal, non-breaking, all [[default: all for HTML, breaking-internal
for JSON]]

options.name: --include-formatting
options.description:
Include formatting-only changes (whitespace,
comments)

options.name: --include-non-impactful
options.description: Include non-impactful changes in JSON output

options.name: --json
options.description: JSON output (stdout if no file specified)

options.name: --mode
options.description: Diff mode: auto, roslyn, or line [[default: auto]]

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Disable colored output

options.name: --open
options.description: Open HTML in default browser after generation

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress default console output

options.name: --text
options.description: Plain text diff (stdout if no file specified)

commands.description:
Compare two files or directories and display the 
differences
